# Mammoth Freight Solutions

Mammoth Freight Solutions is a specialized heavy-haul and oversized cargo transport provider relevant to modular power and packaged infrastructure deployments.

## Why it matters
- Adds realistic freight and route-planning depth to the execution stack.
- Supports the supply-chain-to-site-delivery transition for oversized systems.
- Helps logistics feel like an actual operating layer instead of background glue.

## Best fit
- Oversized packaged electrical systems.
- Prefabricated infrastructure requiring route planning and coordinated delivery.
- Regional project cargo flows around modular power deployment.

## Operational role in the graph
- Strengthens `infrastructure-logistics` and `supply-chain-and-logistics`.
- Connects packaged power decisions to actual transport constraints.
- Helps the graph support credible movement from fabrication to field execution.
